notes: v240 — Visual facelift across the whole app. A refined navy-and-gold look: deeper layered backgrounds, a champagne gold accent used with restraint, and red kept for genuine losses/alerts only. The Instant Report buttons drop their rainbow borders for clean uniform cards with a slim colour marker. Crisp new line icons replace emoji across the cards, report buttons, tabs and section headers. Clearer text contrast everywhere, one consistent button style with a solid-gold main action, subtle shadows and hover lift, tidy thin scrollbars, and visible keyboard-focus outlines. Same app, same data — it just looks like it costs money now. Includes v239's always-load-signals fix.
